name: Chocolate Decandence
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Butter and flour an 8-inch springform pan. Place a circle of wax paper on the bottom.
3. Melt chocolate and butter together in a heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring until smooth.
4. In a separate bowl, beat eggs and sugar with hot water until dissolved and warm.
5. Remove egg mixture from heat and let cool slightly.
6. Beat eggs at high speed until they triple in volume.
7. Gradually fold flour into the egg mixture.
8. Fold half of the whipped egg mixture into the chocolate-butter base.
9. Gently fold in the remaining egg mixture.
10. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 15 minutes in preheated oven.
11. Remove from oven and let cool completely in the pan.
12. Refrigerate until firm.
13. Whisk cream, vanilla, and sugar until stiff peaks form.
14. Invert cake onto a serving platter and remove wax paper.
15. Frost top and sides with 2/3 of the whipped cream.
16. Place remaining frosting in a pastry bag fitted with a star tip to create decorative rosettes around the perimeter.
17. Decorate center with chocolate shavings and return to refrigerator until firm.
Serve each slice with several spoonfuls of raspberry sauce on the side.
